members.name: AutowrapMode
members.summary: If set to something other than [constant TextServer.AUTOWRAP_OFF], the text gets wrapped inside the node's bounding rectangle. If you resize the node, it will change its height automatically to show all the text.

members.name: CurveStep
members.summary: Step (in pixels) used to approximate Bézier curves. Lower values result in smoother curves, but is slower to generate and render. Consider adjusting this according to the font size and the typical viewing distance. [b]Note:[/b] Changing this property will regenerate the mesh, which is a slow operation, especially with large font sizes and long texts.

members.name: Depth
members.summary: Depths of the mesh, if set to [code]0.0[/code] only front surface, is generated, and UV layout is changed to use full texture for the front face only.

members.name: Font
members.summary: Font configuration used to display text.

members.name: FontSize
members.summary: Font size of the [TextMesh]'s text. This property works in tandem with [member pixel_size]. Higher values will result in a more detailed font, regardless of [member curve_step] and [member pixel_size]. Consider keeping this value below 63 (inclusive) for good performance, and adjust [member pixel_size] as needed to enlarge text. [b]Note:[/b] Changing this property will regenerate the mesh, which is a slow operation, especially with large font sizes and long texts. To change the text's size in real-time efficiently, change the node's [member Node3D.scale] instead.

members.name: HorizontalAlignment
members.summary: Controls the text's horizontal alignment. Supports left, center, right, and fill (also known as justify).

members.name: Language
members.summary: Language code used for line-breaking and text shaping algorithms. If left empty, the current locale is used instead.

members.name: LineSpacing
members.summary: Additional vertical spacing between lines (in pixels), spacing is added to line descent. This value can be negative.

members.name: Offset
members.summary: The text drawing offset (in pixels). [b]Note:[/b] Changing this property will regenerate the mesh, which is a slow operation. To change the text's position in real-time efficiently, change the node's [member Node3D.position] instead.

members.name: PixelSize
members.summary: The size of one pixel's width on the text to scale it in 3D. This property works in tandem with [member font_size]. [b]Note:[/b] Changing this property will regenerate the mesh, which is a slow operation, especially with large font sizes and long texts. To change the text's size in real-time efficiently, change the node's [member Node3D.scale] instead.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverride
members.summary: Set BiDi algorithm override for the structured text.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverrideOptions
members.summary: Set additional options for BiDi override.

members.name: Text
members.summary: The text to generate mesh from. [b]Note:[/b] Due to being a [Resource], it doesn't follow the rules of [member Node.auto_translate_mode]. If disabling translation is desired, it should be done manually with [method Object.set_message_translation].

members.name: Uppercase
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], all the text displays as UPPERCASE.

members.name: VerticalAlignment
members.summary: Controls the text's vertical alignment. Supports top, center, and bottom.

members.name: Width
members.summary: Text width (in pixels), used for fill alignment.
